title: Founders Associate
key_evidence: Mozart AI: AI-powered Digital Audio Workstation (music creation). Founded 2025, King's College London founders (Sundar Arvind, Arjun Khanna, Pascual Merita Torres). Raised $6M seed led by Balderton (Jan 2026) on top of ~$1.1M pre-seed; ~$7M total.
Very early-stage, founder-led, small team (sub-20) — Founders Associate hire would be founder-read, not ATS/recruiter. Highest screening score of the batch.

No clean ATS — role surfaced via LinkedIn + founders' posts. Lower applicant visibility/volume than ElevenLabs/Decagon = favourable competition. But also harder to find/verify exact requirements (UNRESEARCHABLE: no canonical JD URL found; requirements inferred from typical seed-stage FA roles).

Strong spike fit: Ryan was literally first employee / Founder's Associate at Minima, scaled 1->30, supported seed + Series A fundraising, ran community-led GTM. This is his exact archetype — founding generalist at a seed AI startup.

Domain is consumer/creator music-tech, not crypto — Ryan has content engine + community growth (YouTube/X/Discord 100k) which maps well to a creator-tool GTM. Founders are creator/music background (Spinnin' Records signee).
Warm-path: small founder-led team, founders post publicly on LinkedIn — discoverable, likely to read a direct, well-targeted outreach.

Risks: seed FA roles often want 0-3yr hungry generalists or technical builders; Ryan at ~6.4yrs may read as senior/expensive; salary likely below his £50k floor at this stage; consumer music domain ramp.
biggest_lever: Ryan's Minima first-employee / Founder's Associate story (seed->Series A, $4.5m community presale, 100k community) is a near-perfect mirror of what a seed AI founder wants; pair with direct founder outreach on LinkedIn.
biggest_risk: No canonical JD or salary visible; seed-stage budgets may sit below £50k and founders may prefer a cheaper/younger or technical FA. Requirements unverifiable.
apply_verdict: Apply / reach out directly to founders — strongest founder-read + spike-fit in this batch despite verification gaps.
